subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto all who dwell in the realm of possibility, that it may draw them unto a station wherein the rustling of its trees is heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی الامکان لیجذبهم الی مقام یسمع من حفیف اشجاره ما
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God
